name: Vegetarian Lasagna (2-layer)
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces fresh spinach, cooked as directed
8 ounces LF Monterey jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Wash spinach and cook leaves in a large skillet with a small amount of water until wilted (2-3 minutes); set aside.
3. In a large saute pan, saute onion and garlic in a small amount of broth or water until translucent.
4. Add carrots, mushrooms, basil, oregano, and parsley; cook until tender.
5. Add olives and tomato ingredients, and cook over low heat until heated through.
6. In a bowl, combine cottage cheese, ricotta, optional egg, and lemon rind.
7. Spread 1/4 cup tomato sauce or puree on the bottom of a 9x13 pan.
8. Layer half each in the following order: noodles, ricotta mixture, spinach, grated mozzarella and jack cheese, and sauce mixture; repeat for second layer.
9. Top with grated Parmesan.
10. Bake 30-40 minutes, let stand 10 minutes before serving.
